target.name: Xsight Labs
target.founder: Guy Koren, Erez Shaizaf, Gal Malach

methods.name: Stage-Progression
methods.rationale: Applies typical Series D → next-stage step-up multiplier (1.5x) to $281M total raised proxy.

methods.name: Peer-Median
methods.rationale: Median across 3 same-sector + same/adjacent-stage peers in Chips & Semiconductors. Range: $529M - $5.0B.

methods.name: Public-Comp Anchoring
methods.skip_reason: target revenue not on file (private companies rarely disclose)
methods.rationale: Public Semiconductors P/S median is 20.6x across 3 tickers. Cannot apply without target's revenue.

private.name: SambaNova Systems
private.rationale: Same sector (Chips & Semiconductors), same stage (Series D), post-money $5B

private.name: Tenstorrent
private.rationale: Same sector (Chips & Semiconductors), same stage (Series D), post-money $2.7B

data.narrative:
Xsight Labs is a Series D semiconductor company that has raised $281M to date. The valuation assessment draws on a universe of 11 comparable companies: 3 public semiconductor peers (ALAB, NVDA, AMD) and 8 private frontier-chip companies including SambaNova Systems, Tenstorrent, Cerebras, PsiQuantum, and Etched.

Two valuation methods are applicable. Stage-progression analysis, using the $281M raised as a proxy for current value and applying a 1.5x step-up multiplier typical for Series D advancement, yields $422M. Peer-median anchoring across three same-sector, same/adjacent-stage comparables produces a $2.7B midpoint, with a range from $529M (DEEPX, Series C) to $5.0B (SambaNova, Series D). Public-comp anchoring via P/S multiples cannot be applied without target revenue disclosure, which is standard for private companies. The semiconductor public-comp median trades at 20.6x revenue.

The two applicable methods triangulate to a range of $358M (low) to $3.1B (high), with a median of $1.6B. This wide spread reflects material variance in peer valuations and methodological assumptions. The stage-progression floor anchors downside conservatively; peer dispersion—a 9.5x spread from DEEPX to SambaNova—dominates upside uncertainty. Key unknowns include Xsight's revenue traction, gross margin profile, and customer concentration relative to named peers.
